subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mindful of the transience of this world, know thou that this ephemeral abode is constrained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنتبهة الی فناء الدنیا اعلمی ان هذه الدار الفانیه ضاقت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
